channel.title: Startup on Guanlan Dai
channel.description: Recent content in Startup on Guanlan Dai

item.title: From a Napkin Offer to a Global Engineering Team: My 8-Year Journey Building Kong
item.description:
How a café chat and a Napkin offer in San Francisco turned into an eight-year adventure building world-class infrastructure.

The Beginning

I never imagined I’d stay with one company for eight years. I still remember that day in San Francisco — Marco Palladino had just closed a funding round and asked me to meet at a café to discuss a bold pivot: “Let’s build the world’s most powerful API platform.”
